un-.t:
pref. 不, 不会的, 无, 未, 非
[医] 不
un-.d:
An inseparable verbal prefix or particle. It is prefixed: (a) To
   verbs to express the contrary, and not the simple negative, of the
   action of the verb to which it is prefixed; as in uncoil, undo, unfold.
   (b) To nouns to form verbs expressing privation of the thing, quality,
   or state expressed by the noun, or separation from it; as in unchild,
   unsex. Sometimes particles and participial adjectives formed with this
   prefix coincide in form with compounds of the negative prefix un- (see
   2d Un-); as in undone (from undo), meaning unfastened, ruined; and
   undone (from 2d un- and done) meaning not done, not finished. Un- is
   sometimes used with an intensive force merely; as

unworn.t: a. 从未穿过的, 还没穿破的, 未磨损的

unworried.t: a. 不担忧的, 不受困扰的
unworried.d: s free of trouble and worry and care

unworthier.t: unworthy（不值得的）的比较级形式

unworthily.t: adv. 不值得尊敬地, 可耻地, 不相称地

unworthiness.t: n. 无价值, 不配得到, 不值得尊敬
unworthiness.d: n. the quality or state of lacking merit or value

unworthy.t: a. 不值得的, 不相称的
unworthy.d: a. lacking in value or merit

unwound.t:
a. 未卷绕的, 未上发条的, 松散的
unwind的过去式和过去分词
unwound.d:
v reverse the winding or twisting of
v separate the tangles of
v become less tense, rest, or take one's ease
v cause to feel relaxed

unwounded.t: a. 未受伤的, 完好无损的

unwrap.d:
v. remove the outer cover or wrapping of
v. make known to the public information that was previously known only to a few people or that was meant to be kept a secret

unwrapped.d: a. not yet wrapped or having the wrapping removed

unwrapping.d:
v remove the outer cover or wrapping of
v make known to the public information that was previously known only to a few people or that was meant to be kept a secret

unwraps.d:
v remove the outer cover or wrapping of
v make known to the public information that was previously known only to a few people or that was meant to be kept a secret

unwreathe.t: vt.解开,展开(卷绕物),使解缠
unwreathe.d: v. t. To untwist, uncoil, or untwine, as anything wreathed.

unwrinkle.d: v. t. To reduce from a wrinkled state; to smooth.

unwritable.t: a. 无法写出的,不适宜书写的

unwritten.t:
a. 非书面的, 没有写的, 没有记录的, 口头的
[法] 习惯, 不成文的, 未记诸文字的
unwritten.d: a. based on custom rather than documentation

unwritten constitution.t:
不成文宪法
[法] 不成文宪法

unwritten law.t:
不成文法
[经] 不成文法, 习惯法, 普通法

unwrought.t: a. 未最后成形的, 粗糙的, 未加工的, 未开发的, 原始的

unwrung.t: a. 不被扭曲的,不感到苦恼的

unyielding.t: a. 不易弯曲的, 不屈的
unyielding.d: s. resistant to physical force or pressure

unyieldingness.d: n. resoluteness by virtue of being unyielding and inflexible

unyoke.t: vt. 卸除轭, 解除束缚

unyoked.t: v. 卸除轭( unyoke的过去式和过去分词 ); 解除束缚; 解开; 停止工作
unyoked.d:
a. Not yet yoked; not having worn the yoke.
a. Freed or loosed from a yoke.
a. Licentious; unrestrained.

unyoking.t: v. 卸除轭( unyoke的现在分词 ); 解除束缚; 解开; 停止工作

unzealous.t: a. 不热心的,不热情的,不积极的

unzip.t:
vi. 拉开拉链
vt. 拉开

unzipping.t: v. 拉开…的拉链( unzip的现在分词 )

unzips.t: v. 拉开…的拉链( unzip的第三人称单数 )

unzoned.t: a. 未划分区域的, 不受限制的
unzoned.d: a. Not zoned; not bound with a girdle; as, an unzoned bosom.
